overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit digital billboards, wet reflective pavement, and towering skyscrapers. The camera moves along a covered sidewalk before looking up at the buildings and approaching a busy intersection with the 'Orbital Air' building visible. Game engine footage with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the building overhang, passing illuminated digital billboards on the right

entered.detail: tall dark office building with reflective glass windows running along the left side of the walkway
large illuminated digital screen displaying advertisements with bright neon colors and high contrast
covered pedestrian walkway with overhead roof sheltering from rain, featuring yellow tactile paving strips
linear array of bright fluorescent street lamps suspended above the walkway
yellow and black striped concrete barrier separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk in a cyberpunk city at night. The left side is dominated by a dark glass office building, while the right side features glowing digital billboards and a road barrier. The walkway is illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights, with wet pavement reflecting the neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway opening to skyscraper canyon view

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers against the rainy night sky
camera tilts back down to street level view of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking forward while looking up at the massive skyscrapers towering overhead, then returning gaze to street level

entered.detail: smooth white concrete retaining wall with integrated planters containing green bushes
tall palm trees visible above the wall when looking upward
massive high-rise buildings with illuminated windows towering into the night sky

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the walkway, the building facade transitions to a white concrete wall with planters. The camera tilts upward to reveal the immense scale of surrounding skyscrapers against the rainy night sky, with palm trees visible above. The digital billboards are now closer on the right, displaying animated neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with corporate headquarters

events.description: vehicles begin passing by on the right as the camera approaches the intersection
reaching the crosswalk at the intersection with the Orbital Air building prominently visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection crosswalk, observing passing vehicles, and stepping onto the crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the wet road with headlights illuminating the rain, followed by other vehicles

entered.detail: massive corporate headquarters with large green 'ORBITAL AIR' signage and curved glass entrance structures
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt road
tall black pole with illuminated pedestrian walk signal and traffic lights
tall cylindrical building with horizontal neon light rings glowing in multiple colors

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the covered walkway ends. The massive Orbital Air building dominates the view ahead with its bright green signage. The camera approaches and steps onto the crosswalk, with vehicles including a black SUV passing by on the wet road. Neon-lit buildings and digital billboards surround the intersection, reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rain-slicked urban corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling, neon-lit city intersection. It begins with a walk along a covered sidewalk, where the dark glass of an office building on the left contrasts with glowing digital billboards and reflective wet pavement on the right. As the camera continues forward, the facade shifts to a white concrete wall with planters, prompting a tilt upward to reveal the immense scale of skyscrapers and palm trees against the rainy night sky. The scene then expands as the walkway ends, opening into a wide intersection dominated by the bright green signage of the Orbital Air building. Finally, the camera steps onto the crosswalk, passing a black SUV as the surrounding neon advertisements cast vibrant reflections across the rain-soaked road.
